title: Wire Harness and Electrical Systems
entry_mechanism: International wire harness manufacturer establishing Saudi operations with labour cost and copper supply advantages
executive_summary:
Wire harnesses — the bundles of wires, connectors, and terminals that distribute electrical power and signals throughout a vehicle — are labour-intensive assemblies requiring high manual dexterity and quality control. Wire harness manufacturing has migrated globally to lower-cost labour countries (Morocco, Tunisia, Ukraine, Mexico, Vietnam) from Germany and Japan as vehicle electrical content has grown. Saudi Arabia's automotive programme requires locally-produced wire harnesses, and the labour cost structure (with Vision 2030 Saudisation flexibility for industrial roles) is competitive with major harness manufacturing hubs.

Saudi Arabia's copper position (potential feedstock from mining programmes) and polymer cable insulation from SABIC create materials supply chain advantages. The addressable Saudi OEM harness market from the full AU programme is estimated at $200–400 million annually.

companies.name: Yazaki Corporation
companies.rationale: Yazaki is the world's largest wire harness manufacturer with extensive emerging market JV experience.

companies.name: Sumitomo Electric Wiring Systems
companies.rationale: SEWS is the second-largest harness manufacturer and has active Middle East automotive supply chain engagement.

companies.name: Delphi Technologies / Aptiv
companies.rationale: Aptiv is a global automotive electrical systems leader with Saudi Arabia market presence.

companies.name: Lear Corporation Electrical
companies.rationale: Lear has automotive electrical systems capability alongside seating (AU-2 synergy).

companies.name: Leoni
companies.rationale: Leoni produces wire harnesses with international manufacturing partnerships.

partners.name: SABIC / Cable Materials
partners.current: PVC and polyethylene for cable insulation production
partners.upgrade: SABIC automotive-grade cable insulation material supply; SABIC connector housing plastic supply; Saudi harness manufacturer as anchor downstream SABIC customer

partners.name: KAEC Industrial Zone
partners.upgrade: Wire harness manufacturing zone at KAEC; shared logistics and materials handling; Saudi harness manufacturer co-located with seating (AU-2) and plastics (AU-4)

partners.name: Saudi OEM Assembly
partners.upgrade: Saudi OEM harness localisation requirement; Yazaki Saudi JV as OEM-approved supplier; Saudi harness as required local content

partners.name: TVTC / Electrical Assembly Training
partners.upgrade: Wire harness assembly technician programme; crimp tool qualification; automotive quality control training
